g.text: Incremental prognostic value of baseline and longitudinal clinical-radiographic information in OAI

text.style: font-size: 6.6px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #667085

g.text: Models were strictly nested. All intervals were derived from participant-level bootstrap resampling.
